purpose: Conceptual reference map of Google Quantum AI open-source tools and their interpretation within CodeWorld Observatory. External references only — not bundled application code.
boundary: This annex is a research and interpretation layer. It does not claim quantum advantage, does not run production quantum workloads, does not imply affiliation with Google, and does not modify CodeWorld's core simulation-first repository governance thesis.

tools.name: Cirq
tools.role_in_quantum_stack: Reference for quantum circuit construction, manipulation, simulation, and noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) experimentation.
tools.codeworld_interpretation: Analog for explicit construction of an intervention plan from primitive operations before any execution — circuits as composable, inspectable change graphs.
tools.boundary_note: Studied externally. Not imported into the web app. Optional local research dependency only.

tools.name: qsim
tools.role_in_quantum_stack: Reference for high-performance simulation of quantum circuits when Cirq-level experiments become computationally heavier.
tools.codeworld_interpretation: Analog for scaling simulation-before-write reasoning when intervention consequence spaces grow large — predicting outcomes before committing.
tools.boundary_note: Heavy simulation is local-only. Never executed inside the Vercel web runtime.

tools.name: Qualtran
tools.role_in_quantum_stack: Reference for representing algorithms, decompositions, and resource requirements with explicit accounting.
tools.codeworld_interpretation: Strongest conceptual fit. Maps directly to CodeWorld's structured intervention accounting — the Resource Consequence Ledger inherits its discipline of explicit, decomposable resource estimation.
tools.boundary_note: Conceptual inspiration for software resource accounting. No quantum claims are made.

tools.name: OpenFermion
tools.role_in_quantum_stack: Reference for chemistry, materials, fermionic systems, Hamiltonians, and scientific simulation.
tools.codeworld_interpretation: Future scientific branch only. Reserved for later research into domain-specific consequence modeling. Not part of Q1.
tools.boundary_note: Future scientific branch. Not used in the web app or Q1 lab scaffold.

tools.name: TensorFlow Quantum
tools.role_in_quantum_stack: Reference for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning research.
tools.codeworld_interpretation: Future hybrid research branch only. Must not be added to the web app runtime.
tools.boundary_note: Future hybrid branch. Explicitly excluded from the application runtime.
